case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROP SUBJ DISP $685.27 U.S. CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROP SUBJ DISP $685.27 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY;
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VISAN, VANJOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROP SUBJ DISP $685.27 U.S. CURRENCY $685.27 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.27, ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR LITIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTOVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. SEE SCANNED DOC
